skills.name: Script Split
skills.description: Split a raw source script into structured episode draft boundaries for review.
skills.appliesWhen: 剧本拆分,剧本切分,script split,script-split,拆集,分集
skills.instruction: For script splitting, use movscript_submit_script_split_draft to create a local script_split draft. Do not return the structured split as assistant JSON. Pass sourceTitle, sourceSummary, lineCount, globalSettings, and episodeDrafts with startLine/endLine, title, summary, globalContext, action, and existingScriptId. Never pass body text, content, original lines, or copied script paragraphs in tool arguments.
skills.outputContract: State that a local script_split review draft was created and summarize the episode count and any warnings. Do not claim formal scripts were written.
